form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Only had one start last campaign favourite; won by a neck at Kyoto G3 Kyoto Sho Fantasy Stakes November 1 over 1400m defeating Shonan Charis with 55.0kg at $2.80. First up last campaign 3rd of 10 at Niigata in the G3 Niigata Nisai Stakes on August 24 over 1600m, 4 len behind Realize Sirius carrying 55.0kg at $4.40. Don't dismiss lightly.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 42 days. Last start 3rd of 15 at this track in the G2 Tulip Sho (1000 Guineas Trial) on March 1 over 1600m, 0.6 len behind Taisei Vogue with 55.0kg at $2.60. At only start last preparation 5th of 18 at this track in the G1 Hanshin Juvenile Fillies on December 14 over 1600m, 3 len behind Star Anise with 55.0kg at $2.60. Hit the line hard fresh and close to the winner. Drawn better and even fitter. Tough to stop late.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation favourite; scored a big 4 len win at Kyoto LR January 17 over 1400m defeating Princess Moko with 55.0kg at $1.60. Won previous preparation first up favourite; scored a big 3.5 len win at Sapporo September 6 over 1500m defeating Gobadu carrying 55.0kg at $2.80. Unbeaten filly facing her toughest test but far too good latest and has upside. Expecting a bright start to the campaign.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 57 days. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.5 len at Tokyo G3 Daily Hai Queen Cup February 14 over 1600m defeating Zippy Tune with 55.0kg at $3.40. At only start last preparation won by a head at Tokyo November 30 over 1600m defeating Corteo Soleil with 55.0kg at $2.10. Exciting filly who was too good fresh. Tricky gate but leading rider aboard and expected to measure up.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign won by 1.3 len at this track G1 Hanshin Juvenile Fillies December 14 over 1600m defeating Garavogue carrying 55.0kg at $5. Hard to beat again.
